script:
So this happened when I was still in high school.
Our school had this one hallway that almost nobody used after classes ended.
One day I stayed late because I had detention and by the time I finished it was already getting dark outside.
As I was leaving, I heard someone knocking.
At first I thought it was coming from outside, but then I realized it was coming from one of the classrooms down the hallway.
The weird part was that all the classroom doors were supposed to be locked after school.
I walked closer and the knocking stopped.
I figured maybe someone was messing with me, so I grabbed the door handle.
It was locked.
Then I heard a voice from inside the room quietly say, “Hey… can you let me out?”
I stepped back because I was pretty sure nobody was supposed to be there.
I asked who it was.
The voice said, “I got stuck in here earlier.”
So I went to find the janitor.
When we came back a minute later, he unlocked the door and opened it.
The classroom was empty.
No one inside.
No open windows.
No place someone could hide.
The janitor looked confused and asked why I said someone was stuck in there.
Then he told me something that made my stomach drop.
That classroom hadn’t been used all year because the floor inside had partially collapsed last summer.
No one had been inside it for months.
